products.description: The Flowerpot VP2 Pendant by &Tradition, designed by Verner Panton in 1968, is formed from two opposed glossy hemispheres in a wide palette of lacquered colors, throwing a soft downward glow. A defining icon of pop-era Danish design. By &Tradition.

finishes.name: Cobalt Blue and Twilight Blue Pattern

products.warranty: &Tradition / manufacturer limited warranty (typically 2 years)

products.description: A drum/barrel-shaped pendant with a slatted natural-wood-veneer body surrounding a white acrylic diffuser, handcrafted in Brazil by Accord Iluminacao. The warm wood slats create a soft, patterned glow. Available in several wood finishes such as Imbuia.
products.material: Natural wood veneer body; white acrylic diffuser
products.warranty: Accord Iluminacao warrants its handcrafted lighting against manufacturing defects; standard coverage is approximately 1 year (verify current terms with the dealer). Natural wood variation is not a defect.

products.description: The Canoa LED pendant features two long pieces of natural wood veneer that meet to form an architectural canoe shape, with light diffused through white acrylic. It is handcrafted in Brazil and includes an integrated 32W LED module (3000K, 90 CRI). Offered in finishes such as American Walnut, Imbuia, Maple and Teak.
products.material: Natural wood veneer; white acrylic diffuser; integrated LED
products.warranty: Accord Iluminacao warrants its handcrafted lighting against manufacturing defects; standard coverage is approximately 1 year (verify current terms with the dealer). Natural wood variation is not a defect.

products.description: Knit-Wit 45 Oval by Made by Hand (designed by Iskos-Berlin, distributed in the US by Ameico) is a pleated, knitted textile pendant whose folded fabric forms a soft sculptural drum that diffuses a warm, even glow. The collapsible shade ships flat and expands into shape. Made in Denmark.
products.material: Pleated knitted polyester textile, metal hardware
products.warranty: Made by Hand 2-year warranty against defects

products.description: The Jakobsson Table Lamp (designed by Hans-Agne Jakobsson, produced by Yamagiwa, distributed by Ameico) features a shade of overlapping thin pine veneer slats that filter a warm, dappled glow. Each slat is hand-assembled for a natural, organic light quality. Made in Japan.
products.warranty: Manufacturer limited warranty against defects (Yamagiwa/Ameico)

products.description: Inspired by modern Danish design, the Aaron chair is a sculptural statement piece that's a delight to view from any angle. A solid walnut or gray ash base securely cradles the contoured seat structure, while subtle curves and refined tailoring let it pair easily with many styles. It features a tight back, loose seat cushion, and single-needle top-stitched seams.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; premium high-density, high-resiliency foam cushions; exposed solid wood base in natural walnut or gray ash.
products.warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on frame and seating suspension; 5 years against defects in materials and workmanship. Handcrafted in Dallas, Texas.

products.description: A modern take on a classic look, the Ada Comfort Recliner features a delicate rolled arm that blends with transitional, traditional, and eclectic decors. Its curvy, sleek frame is accentuated by single-needle top-stitching, and the patented mechanism lets the back and footrest operate independently for an infinitely adjustable, perfectly customized position. Choose a Brushed Metal swivel base or solid wood legs in natural walnut or gray ash.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; premium high-density, high-resiliency foam; patented Infinity reclining mechanism; choice of brushed-metal swivel or wood base.
products.warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on frame and seating suspension; 3-year warranty on the reclining mechanism (and power motor where applicable), 1-year on battery pack; 5 years on materials and workmanship. Made in the USA.

products.description: The perfect blend of traditional and modern, the Adley Comfort Recliner features a timeless rolled arm that blends seamlessly with any decor depending on the covering. A patented reclining mechanism lets the footrest and back operate independently for a customized recline. Choose a Brushed Metal swivel base or solid wood base/legs in natural walnut or gray ash.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; premium high-density, high-resiliency foam; patented Infinity reclining mechanism; brushed-metal swivel or wood base.

products.description: The Alessandro Ottoman complements the Alessandro collection's contemporary, strong-lined design. Broad metal legs add an edgy European flavor, with cushions made from eco-friendly soy-based high-resiliency foam over an all-hardwood frame. It works as a footrest, extra seating, or a casual surface.

products.description: Strong lines make the Alessandro a contemporary stand-out. Track arms and a rectangular shape frame the soft seat and back cushions, while broad metal legs add an edgy European flavor that can be muted with optional tapered wood-block legs. Cushions use eco-friendly soy-based high-resiliency foam, and corner-block construction with an all-hardwood frame ensures stability and durability.

products.warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on frame and seating suspension; 5 years against defects in materials and workmanship. Made in the USA.

products.description: The Alora Comfort Sleeper's signature slope arms, simple silhouette, and clean European tailoring make it a stylish option spanning modern to transitional. As part of American Leather's Comfort Sleeper line, it features the patented Tiffany 24/7 sleep system that opens easily without bars or sagging, in mattress sizes from cot to king. Fully customizable in hundreds of leathers and fabrics.

products.description: At Loll we have always been inspired by original design and when we first set out to make an Adirondack chair it had to be our own version. But truly we are all just making an iteration of the original Adirondack chair. The one that has always inspired us is the first, the Westport Chair designed by Thomas Lee in 1903 for his summer cottage overlooking Lake Champlain in Westport, NY. The Westport is undeniably the most iconic American outdoor lounge chair and the original design that spawned countless varieties all based on that 11 piece design statement.
products.warranty: 5-year limited residential warranty: all components are warranted against defects for five years from shipment for residential use; aluminum inserts and stainless steel hardware are also warranted 5 years; Sunbrella fabric 5 years, cushion inserts 1 year, furniture covers 3 years. It can be washed in a home washing machine without an agitator, depending on the size. Any rug size 5' x 7'6" or smaller, including all runners, can fit into a washing machine that's 3.4 cubic feet or bigger; 6' x 9' rugs require a washer that's 4.2 cubic feet or bigger, 7'6" x 9'6" rugs require a washer that's 4.8 cubic feet or bigger, 9' x 12' rugs must be washed in a commercial washer with at least a 60-lb capacity. Wash in cold water, delicate cycle, with mild detergent, and no bleach, hang dry or lay flat to dry.

products.description: Heritage is Loloi's best collection yet. products.description: The Circa 3581 is a modern office chair upholstered in semi-aniline leather with a color-matched outer shell. It offers smooth height adjustment, 360-degree swivel, and easy mobility on smooth-glide casters atop a polished aluminum base (300 lb capacity).
products.material: Semi-aniline leather upholstery, molded foam, polished aluminum base
products.warranty: 5-year limited residential warranty (select chairs); 5-year commercial

products.description: The Circa 3582 is a modern office chair upholstered in durable performance fabric. It offers smooth height adjustment, 360-degree swivel, and easy mobility on smooth-glide casters atop a polished aluminum base (300 lb capacity).
products.material: Performance fabric upholstery, molded foam, polished aluminum base
products.warranty: 5-year limited residential warranty (select chairs); 5-year commercial

products.description: With the bravura of Italian craftsmanship, Circa is defined by its wraparound curved backrest and waterfall front edge. The finely tailored upholstery augments the graceful form, while inner layers of variable-density foam over a webbing-supported seat ensure extended comfort. The airy metal base comes in chrome-plated, brushed, or powder-coated finishes. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.
products.material: Brushed or powder-coated metal base, variable-density foam/polyurethane over webbing, fabric or leather upholstery
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen frames are engineered for long-term use (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: Circa's flowing shape envelops the body and provides impressive comfort within a small footprint in the expanded lounge chair. A responsive webbing seat concealed within the formed foam cradles the sitter, sturdily set on an angled steel base in a choice of finishes. Handsomely made in Italy, its distinctive arc silhouette and waterfall seat cushion suit a range of upholstery textiles and leathers. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.
products.material: Angled steel base, formed foam over responsive webbing, fabric or leather upholstery
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen frames are engineered for long-term use (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: The Circa Pendant is a ringed, halo-shaped LED pendant whose tiered concentric bands create a layered, floating glow with no visible light source. Its sculptural minimalism makes it a centerpiece over dining tables and stairwells. Designed by Pablo Studio.
products.warranty: Pablo limited 2-year warranty against defects in material and workmanship (excludes replaceable bulbs)

products.description: The Collar Dining Chair provides a comfortable seating experience with a distinctive backrest inspired by a shirt collar. It features a flexible polyurethane body supported by a sturdy metal frame, with a base available in two oak finishes to match various settings. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.
products.material: Metal frame, flexible polyurethane body, oak base
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen builds to last with proper care (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: A hand-forged steel end table from Charleston Forge with a clean, tapered profile and an inset top offered in glass or solid wood. Each piece is welded, forged and hand-finished to order in North Carolina.
products.material: Hand-forged steel base; inset top (glass or solid wood)
products.warranty: Charleston Forge limited warranty against defects for one year under normal residential use; does not cover damage from negligence or misuse.

products.description: A fully upholstered bed with a clean, contemporary profile and resilient performance fabric covering the frame. Available with or without optional wall panels and in a wide range of cover tiers including COM. The upholstered frame gives a soft, modern bedroom anchor.
products.material: Upholstered hardwood frame in performance fabric
products.warranty: Universal Furniture one-year limited warranty against defects in materials and workmanship for the original purchaser under normal residential use. Excludes commercial use.

products.description: The Continuum 3472 is a modern full-length cheval standing mirror with a 360-degree swivel base and smooth up-and-down tilt for easy adjustment. A weighted base provides stability and an integrated accessory hook adds function to the floating, freestanding design.
products.material: Hardwood solids and veneers, powder-coated steel, mirror glass
products.warranty: 1-year limited warranty (mirrors)

products.description: The Contour Floor Lamp pairs a slim stem with a flexible, foldable diffuser that bends to shape the light, offering adjustable task and ambient illumination. Its tailored fabric form and weighted base make it a sculptural reading lamp. Designed by Pablo Studio.
products.material: Foldable fabric/silicone diffuser, metal stem, weighted base
products.warranty: Pablo limited 2-year warranty against defects in material and workmanship (excludes replaceable bulbs)

products.description: The Contour Table Lamp features a flexible, foldable diffuser that can be molded to direct or soften the LED light, set on a compact weighted base. Its adjustable, sculptural shade is a Pablo signature. Designed by Pablo Studio.
products.material: Foldable fabric/silicone diffuser, weighted metal base
products.warranty: Pablo limited 2-year warranty against defects in material and workmanship (excludes replaceable bulbs)

products.description: A long, hand-forged steel console table from Charleston Forge with a slim profile suited to entryways and behind sofas. The inset top is offered in glass or solid wood (maple, ash, walnut). Handmade to order in Boone, North Carolina.
products.material: Hand-forged steel base; inset top (glass or solid maple/ash/walnut)
products.warranty: Charleston Forge limited warranty against defects for one year under normal residential use; does not cover damage from negligence or misuse.

products.description: The Cove Dining Chair is part of BDI's new dining collection, designed to pair with its Bloom and Halcyon tables. It features a gently curved, fully upholstered seat shell on a slim black metal base, offered in colorways such as black-on-black and oatmeal with a black base. The design carries BDI's signature blend of refined materials and clean, functional form into the dining room.
products.material: Upholstered fabric seat shell on a powder-coated steel base
products.warranty: 3-year limited residential warranty (1 year commercial)

products.description: Similar to a cricket's chirp, humans converse at different rates depending on the temperature of their environment. This modern patio dining chair is designed to warm up the environment – aesthetically anyway – and induce social interaction. As well as being a conversation aid, the simple seat and back angles are comfortable to sit for extended periods of time. Made with from recycled plastic, no maintenance is required – ever.
products.warranty: 5-year limited residential warranty: all components are warranted against defects for five years from shipment for residential use; aluminum inserts and stainless steel hardware are also warranted 5 years; Sunbrella fabric 5 years, cushion inserts 1 year, furniture covers 3 years. Hardware exposed to salt water is not warranted.

products.description: A console from Charleston Forge's Cristobal collection featuring a continuous line motif with a suspended lower shelf beneath the top. Hand-forged in steel and built to order in North Carolina, with a top offered in glass or solid wood.

products.warranty: Charleston Forge limited warranty against defects for one year under normal residential use; does not cover damage from negligence or misuse.

products.warranty: Charleston Forge limited warranty against defects for one year under normal residential use; does not cover damage from negligence or misuse.

products.description: A deft play on midcentury furnishings, the Edward Sectional was inspired by renowned design icon Edward Wormley. With varied-size sections, the highly adaptable seating has a visual lightness and contemporary silhouette, built with thoughtful innovations including a steel frame with a webbing suspension system. A single seat cushion with button detail references Wormley's era, while scattered down-filled cushions and a slim backrest with baffled back cushions provide lumbar comfort. Bronzato-finish metal legs.
products.material: Steel frame, webbing suspension, down-filled and foam cushions, bronzato-finish metal legs, fabric or leather upholstery
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen sofa frames are engineered to last 15-20 years with normal daily use (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: Elle departs from the usual run of sofas by offering a choice of seat depths, available in a Standard model (27.5 in. seat depth) or a Deep expanded option (35.5 in.). Composed of individual modules, its seat and back cushions are engineered with a layered foam core and wrapped in a generous amount of feathers and down for sink-into-it comfort. The casual yet tailored look uses slightly oversized cushion covers attached by velcro and removable for easy cleaning. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.
products.material: Internal metal frame, layered foam core wrapped in feathers and down, fabric or leather upholstery
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen sofa frames are engineered to last 15-20 years with normal daily use (per bensen.com Product Care).

A concealed storage area accessed by a hydraulic lift fits any queen- or king-size mattress, and the integrated steel frame eliminates the need for a box spring, replacing it with adjustable wooden slats for desired lumbar support. The strikingly angular headboard is purposely tall to rest against while sitting up, with a gentle wedge to the lower half offering essential support. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen.

products.description: Inspired by the rocking chairs found on the front porches in the Carolinas where there is nothing more peaceful than a light rocking motion in a warm breeze while enjoying the great outdoors, the Fredricksonn Rocker, like our Modern Adirondack Rocking chair, is a new take on a classic outdoor design. Featuring a taller seat height and a more upright sit the Fredicksonn is ready for front porches everywhere.

products.description: Going through the impeccable furniture sketches of midcentury architect Ralph Rapson could possibly be one of the best ways to spend a cold winter afternoon in Minnesota. We found his Cave Chair illustration and immediately thought it would be a great collaboration piece that fit the aesthetic of Loll's modern outdoor furniture. Ralph originally conceived this chair in 1943 as plywood with a cushion, but it was never actually produced. Part of Loll's Rapson® Collection , this perfectly oversized, futuristic, comfortable and fun, modern Cave Chair will induce hours of conversation – whether you're sitting in it or just walking by.

The Cirrus Comfort Air is as chic as it is inviting. A plush, channeled back and seat cushion encased in down provides instant comfort, and a revolutionary patented mechanism responds to your every move for infinite ways to relax. Available in three sizes on a four-star base (Antique Brass, Burnished Bronze, or Polished Nickel) or a disc base in Polished Nickel or Natural Walnut. Ottoman sold separately.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; down-encased channeled cushions; patented Comfort Air reclining mechanism; metal or walnut base.
products.warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on frame and seating suspension; 3-year warranty on the reclining mechanism and power motor, 1-year on battery pack; 5 years on materials and workmanship. Made in the USA.

products.description: The Cloud Comfort Air pays homage to the sleekness of American Leather's iconic design, featuring a tailored track arm and chic, customizable base. A revolutionary patented mechanism responds to your every move for infinite ways to relax. Available in three sizes on a disc base (Natural Walnut or Brushed Metal) or four-star base in Antique Brass, Burnished Bronze, or Polished Nickel. Ottoman sold separately.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; high-resiliency foam cushions; patented Comfort Air reclining mechanism; metal or walnut base.
products.warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on frame and seating suspension; 3-year warranty on the reclining mechanism and power motor, 1-year on battery pack; 5 years on materials and workmanship. Made in the USA.

products.description: The Como Comfort Air vision was drawn from Northern Italian speedboat design synonymous with elegance. Contoured taper arms that nearly reach the floor give Como its graceful, timeless silhouette, while plush buttonless tufting on the back and seat cushions provides superior comfort with every move. This zero-gravity recliner conforms to your movements; choose from four bases including a natural walnut four-star base. Ottoman sold separately.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; buttonless-tufted high-resiliency cushions; patented Comfort Air reclining mechanism; four base options including natural walnut four-star base.
products.warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on frame and seating suspension; 3-year warranty on the reclining mechanism and power motor, 1-year on battery pack; 5 years on materials and workmanship. Made in the USA.

products.description: The Cumulus is a beautiful hybrid formed between the Cirrus and Cloud, boasting an iconic track arm paired with a soft, down-infused back. Each Comfort Air features a revolutionary mechanism that responds to your every move. Available in three sizes on a four-star base in Antique Brass, Burnished Bronze, or Polished Nickel, or a disc base in Natural Walnut or Polished Nickel. Ottoman sold separately.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; down-infused high-resiliency cushions; patented Comfort Air reclining mechanism; metal or walnut base.
products.warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on frame and seating suspension; 3-year warranty on the reclining mechanism and power motor, 1-year on battery pack; 5 years on materials and workmanship. Made in the USA.

products.description: The Huron Comfort Air is a revolutionary seating experience providing infinite seating positions custom-tailored to move with your body. It features asymmetrical curvature on both the back and seat cushions for supreme comfort, with a zero-gravity mechanism that lets it conform perfectly to your body for the feeling of floating. Splayed track arms and a waterfall back and seat complete the look; available in multiple sizes, ottoman sold separately.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; high-resiliency foam cushions; patented zero-gravity Comfort Air reclining mechanism; metal or walnut base.
products.warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on frame and seating suspension; 3-year warranty on the reclining mechanism and power motor, 1-year on battery pack; 5 years on materials and workmanship. Made in the USA.

products.description: Lanier’s robust silhouette is reminiscent of early 1970’s style with a modern spin. Channel quilting on both the back and seat cushions encase you for the best reclining experience. Lanier’s low profile follows the shape of classic automotive designs as it tapers in width from top to bottom. Discover remarkable comfort in every hand-stitched detail of this modern rocking chair.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; high-resiliency foam cushions over a steel reclining/motion mechanism, custom-built to order in the USA.
products.warranty: American Leather limited lifetime warranty on the frame and seating suspension; reclining/motion mechanism covered per American Leather's standard motion warranty terms.

products.description: Sleek lines without compromising comfort. The Lumen collection gives you all the comfort of a high-back seating experience, but cameoflauges as a sharp, low-back profile. Available as an analog ratchet back, the headrest easily lifts and locks to any pose for the ultimate shoulder support. Alternatively, choose the Lumen Power to make this functionality seamless with the push of a button.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; high-resiliency foam seat cushions, custom-built to order in the USA.
products.warranty: American Leather limited lifetime warranty on the frame and seating suspension; coverage on leather, fabric and foam per American Leather's standard warranty terms.

products.description: Inspired by the flowing lines of classic Parisian automobiles, Ontario's soft curvature defines transitional style for the ultimate lounging experience. The rolling shape of Ontario’s arms highlight this glider recliner chairs form as they gently slope from front to back. Its soft transitional style is perfect to complement any living space from modern to traditional. Both back and seat cushions feature refined detail that gives Ontario its tailored look. Its waterfall back cushion seamlessly meets with the seat cushion for premium comfort. The combination of this glider chair with ottoman provides a hammock experience while you glide back and forth.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; high-resiliency foam cushions over a steel reclining/motion mechanism, custom-built to order in the USA.

products.description: The Pileus Comfort Air's buttonless tufted back and seat bring the WOW factor. The look combines dramatic splayed arms with plush down for ultimate comfort. The Pileus is available in three sizes, custom tailored to fit every body type. The Comfort Air features a revolutionary weight balanced mechanism that instantly responds your every move. Customize the Pileus by choosing any leather, fabric, or bring your own personal covering. A disc base is available in Natural Walnut or Brushed Metal, while a four star base is available in Antique Brass, Burnished Bronze or Polished Nickel.

products.description: Rainier, like the name, is inspired by utilitarian apparel. Its mimicked European tailoring technique gives this Comfort Air™ style without compromising comfort. Oversized, asymmetrical double-needle channel quilting on the exterior arm and seatback creates a consistent, seamless look to compliment your living room. This unique upholstery pattern contours to your body, allowing for a personal modern lounge experience. Experience a heightened sense of comfort with the Rainier as you lean back and recline in full extension.
products.material: Top-grain leather or fabric over a kiln-dried hardwood frame; high-resiliency foam cushions over a steel reclining/motion mechanism, custom-built to order in the USA.

products.description: Savoy works with every style from traditional to contemporary. Rolled arms offer a hint of tradition while sleek tailoring makes for an easy transitional style. products.description: Sculptural slopes and tailored precision – motion concealed behind a quiet, low profile. Sleek and architectural, the Soho provides a sturdy, structured form with smartly placed curves to create a building-like drama that anchors any contemporary space. With a subtle hidden motion, a legrest seamlessly emerges at the touch of a button. Spanning from a domestic metropolitan style to a european air, the piece seamlessly transitions between any modern design aesthetic, offering comfort and a strong design presence.

products.description: Delta is all smooth surfaces, defined by a single seat cushion and softly rounded right angles. Its comfortable slant comes from soft down-fill over a multi-layer seat on a webbed frame, and large back cushions can be supplemented with smaller throw-pillow-style cushions as desired. A built-in steel frame allows for corner or inset-foot placement. Designed by Niels Bendtsen for Bensen; offered in 175, 210, and 245 cm widths.
products.material: Powder-coated steel frame, webbed suspension, down-fill and foam cushions, chrome, fabric or leather upholstery
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen sofa frames are engineered to last 15-20 years with normal daily use (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: For smaller spaces, Lite includes a scaled-down 2-seat model with the collection's signature geometric look and nickel-finish base. It is fabricated with a steel-reinforced laminated wood frame and a spring suspension system adapted from automobiles, delivering comfort while taking up minimal space. Cushions are CFC-free polyurethane softened by a fabric wrap, with the back cushions baffled to prevent shifting of feathers; fabric covers are removable. An iconic Niels Bendtsen design for Bensen.
products.material: Steel-reinforced laminated wood frame, automobile-style spring suspension, CFC-free polyurethane and feather cushions, nickel-finish metal base, fabric or leather upholstery
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen sofa frames are engineered to last 15-20 years with normal daily use (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: Clean-lined and comfortable, the Neo 2 Seater adapts the series' geometric look in a sofa designed for smaller spaces. Innovative construction underscores the straightforward seating, handmade by a single Bensen craftsman, with a steel-reinforced laminated wood frame and an automobile-style steel-spring suspension. Seat cushions are CFC-free polyurethane softened by a continuous fiber wrap, and back cushions are baffled to prevent shifting of feathers. Designed by Niels Bendtsen.
products.material: Steel-reinforced laminated wood frame, automobile-style steel-spring suspension, CFC-free polyurethane and feather cushions, powder-coated metal legs, fabric or leather upholstery
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen sofa frames are engineered to last 15-20 years with normal daily use (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: The Radii Coffee Table is crafted from solid oak or walnut with a signature beveled edge that accentuates the natural grain, following radius cuts that blend into the legs. products.material: Solid oak or walnut with water-based polyurethane finish
products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen solid-wood pieces are finished with a low-build polyurethane lacquer and built to last with proper care (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: Radii grades on a refined curve with its signature beveled tabletop detail that follows radius cuts to blend with the legs, giving the solid-wood dining table a visual lightness while showcasing superb craftsmanship in white oak or American walnut. A lengthwise tensioning bar inset in the underside keeps the top perfectly flat over time, while lateral steel bars eliminate wood shifting or cracking. Finished with an advanced water-based polyurethane. This is the 200 cm version.

products.warranty: No formal published warranty term; Bensen solid-wood tables are reinforced with steel bars and finished with a polyurethane lacquer, built to last with proper care (per bensen.com Product Care).

products.description: The Z-Bar Gen 4 Desk Lamp refines Koncept's flagship articulating LED task light with a cleaner joint profile, greater reach, and softened, even optics (888 lumens, 90 CRI). A touchstrip dimmer runs the length of the head. Designed by Kenneth Ng & Edmund Ng.
